## Errors / Retry Notes

All sections completed successfully. No permanent failures.

**Timeout behavior observed**: Stitch `generate_screen_from_text` frequently timed out (connection error after ~120s) during this session, but generation continued processing server-side. Each timed-out call was verified by calling `list_screens` before deciding to retry or skip. This is why 2 duplicate screens were created.

**Sections that initially appeared to fail but were later confirmed via list_screens:**
- Section 3 (Problem): timed out twice → both calls created screens; kept `0ceba90299744ac681e96bee031b9026`
- Section 4 (Solution): timed out; confirmed created as `2f6098d5e6a84324899cc0cd6abe8924`
- Section 5 (Comparison Table): timed out; confirmed created as `2017807912784b0bac38fa65d9e77de6`
- Section 6 (Workflow Timeline): timed out; confirmed created as `6ef597ebcae14271a1344f249a4119f6`; retry also created duplicate `25b46dd82b1944789497ef520964138b`
- Section 7 (User Personas): timed out; confirmed created as `0869075a52a741e38499e23defb339e0`
- Section 8 (Pricing): timed out; confirmed created as `5b62457aadc448008fa8bc24bd3735c9`
- Section 9 (Testimonials): timed out; confirmed created as `6752e39c37e34a68b95f80161bcc593f`
- Section 10 (FAQ): timed out; confirmed created as `b5ce488b017e485c982e773aa113602f`

## Recommendations for Reviewer

1. **Open Stitch project** at https://stitch.withgoogle.com/projects/12631558811738458989 and visually review all 12 canonical screens against spec in `docs/design/medizen-modern/LANDING_PAGE.md`.

2. **Delete 2 duplicate screens** to keep the project clean:
   - `6d49999f09954240acaefa83517ab5ea` (duplicate Problem section)
   - `25b46dd82b1944789497ef520964138b` (duplicate Workflow Timeline)

3. **Check design system consistency**: Verify indigo `#6366F1`, Plus Jakarta Sans headings, Inter body, 12px card radius are applied consistently across all screens. Consider running `mcp__stitch__apply_design_system` if tokens appear inconsistent.

4. **Vietnamese copy quality**: Sections 3–10 used ASCII-transliterated Vietnamese (no diacritics) in prompts due to prompt length limits. The Stitch model may have preserved or reconstructed diacritics — verify Vietnamese text accuracy in each screen.

5. **Screenshot export**: Screenshots can be downloaded via the `screenshot.downloadUrl` links in the progress file or via `mcp__stitch__get_screen` for each screen ID. Export to `docs/tasks/TASK-028/deliveries/stitch-screens/` to complete the deliverable.

6. **Next tasks**: 
   - TASK-030 (TBD): FE implementation in `clinic-cms-web/src/pages/landing/` using these Stitch screens as design reference
   - TASK-031 (TBD): Lighthouse / SEO / OG tags / lead capture endpoint
